languages.text: {n}Фактотум принимается рассеянно вертеть в руке автоперо.{/n}"Дайте подумать... Действительно, странно. Я изучил историю династии достаточно подробно, чтобы помнить все крупные боестолкновения за последнее тысячелетие, и ни одно из них не происходило в столице".

{n}The Factotum takes to absent-mindedly twirling the autoquill in his hand.{/n} "Let me think... That is strange indeed. I have studied the history of the dynasty in enough detail to recall all the major battles of the last millennium, and none took place on the capital world."
languages.original_text: {n}Фактотум принимается рассеянно вертеть в руке автоперо.{/n}"Дайте подумать... Действительно, странно. Я изучил историю династии достаточно подробно, чтобы помнить все крупные боестолкновения за последнее тысячелетие, и ни одно из них не происходило в столице".

traits.locale_text: {n}The Factotum takes to absent-mindedly twirling the autoquill in his hand.{/n}"Let me think... That is strange indeed. I have studied the history of the dynasty in enough detail to recall all the major battles of the last millennium, and none took place on the capital world."

{n}The Factotum takes to absent-mindedly twirling the autoquill in his hand.{/n}"Let me think... That is strange indeed. I have studied the history of the dynasty in enough detail to recall all the major battles of the last millennium, and none took place on the capital world."

{n}The Factotum takes to absent-mindedly twirling the autoquill in his hand.{/n}"Let me think... That is strange indeed. I have studied the history of the dynasty in enough detail to recall all the major battles of the last millennium, and none took place on the capital world."

languages.text: {n}高阶顾问心不在焉地转着手中的自动羽毛笔。{/n}“容我想想……这确实蹊跷。我对本王朝的历史钻研颇深，过去千年的每一场大战我都记得，可首都世界从未发生过这种战事。”
languages.original_text: {n}The Factotum takes to absent-mindedly twirling the autoquill in his hand.{/n} "Let me think... That is strange indeed. I have studied the history of the dynasty in enough detail to recall all the major battles of the last millennium, and none took place on the capital world."

traits.locale_text: {n}高阶顾问心不在焉地转着手中的自动羽毛笔。{/n}“容我想想……这确实蹊跷。我对本王朝的历史钻研颇深，过去千年的每一场大战我都记得，可首都世界从未发生过这种战事。”

languages.text: {n}El Factótum juguetea distraídamente con la autopluma que sostiene en la mano.{/n} «Déjeme pensar... sin duda es de lo más extraño. He estudiado la historia de la dinastía en profundidad y recuerdo al detalle las principales batallas del último milenio; ninguna de ellas tuvo lugar en el mundo capital».
languages.original_text: {n}The Factotum takes to absent-mindedly twirling the autoquill in his hand.{/n} "Let me think... That is strange indeed. I have studied the history of the dynasty in enough detail to recall all the major battles of the last millennium, and none took place on the capital world."

traits.locale_text: {n}El Factótum juguetea distraídamente con la autopluma que sostiene en la mano.{/n}«Déjeme pensar... sin duda es de lo más extraño. He estudiado la historia de la dinastía en profundidad y recuerdo al detalle las principales batallas del último milenio; ninguna de ellas tuvo lugar en el mundo capital».

languages.text: {n}Le factotum fait tourner l'autoplume dans sa main d'un air absent.{/n} « Laissez-moi réfléchir... C'est vraiment très étrange... J'ai suffisamment étudié l'histoire de la dynastie pour me souvenir de toutes les grandes batailles majeures du millénaire, et aucune n'a eu lieu sur le monde-capitale. »
languages.original_text: {n}The Factotum takes to absent-mindedly twirling the autoquill in his hand.{/n} "Let me think... That is strange indeed. I have studied the history of the dynasty in enough detail to recall all the major battles of the last millennium, and none took place on the capital world."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le factotum fait tourner l'autoplume dans sa main d'un air absent.{/n} « Laissez-moi réfléchir... C'est vraiment très étrange... J'ai suffisamment étudié l'histoire de la dynastie pour me souvenir de toutes les grandes batailles majeures du millénaire, et aucune n'a eu lieu sur le monde-capitale. »

languages.text: {n}Das Faktotum spielt gedankenverloren mit der Autofeder in seiner Hand.{/n} "Lasst mich nachdenken ... Das ist in der Tat seltsam. Ich habe die Geschichte der Dynastie ausgiebig studiert, um mich an alle wichtigen Schlachten des letzten Jahrtausends zu erinnern, aber keine davon ereignete sich auf der Hauptwelt."
languages.original_text: {n}The Factotum takes to absent-mindedly twirling the autoquill in his hand.{/n} "Let me think... That is strange indeed. I have studied the history of the dynasty in enough detail to recall all the major battles of the last millennium, and none took place on the capital world."

traits.locale_text: {n}Das Faktotum spielt gedankenverloren mit der Autofeder in seiner Hand.{/n}"Lasst mich nachdenken ... Das ist in der Tat seltsam. Ich habe die Geschichte der Dynastie ausgiebig studiert, um mich an alle wichtigen Schlachten des letzten Jahrtausends zu erinnern, aber keine davon ereignete sich auf der Hauptwelt."

languages.text: {n}Kâhya, dalgın dalgın elindeki otoyazarı çevirmeye başlıyor.{/n} "Bırakın da bir düşüneyim... Bu gerçekten çok tuhaf. Hanedanlığın tarihini, son bin yılın tüm büyük savaşlarını hatırlayacak kadar detaylı inceledim ve hiçbiri başdünyada gerçekleşmemiş."
languages.original_text: {n}The Factotum takes to absent-mindedly twirling the autoquill in his hand.{/n} "Let me think... That is strange indeed. I have studied the history of the dynasty in enough detail to recall all the major battles of the last millennium, and none took place on the capital world."

traits.locale_text: {n}Kâhya, dalgın dalgın elindeki otoyazarı çevirmeye başlıyor.{/n} "Bırakın da bir düşüneyim... Bu gerçekten çok tuhaf. Hanedanlığın tarihini, son bin yılın tüm büyük savaşlarını hatırlayacak kadar detaylı inceledim ve hiçbiri başdünyada gerçekleşmemiş."

languages.text: {n}ファクトゥムは、オートキルの先を無意識に回している。{/n}「考えてみましょう...それは確かに奇妙ですね。私はこの王朝の歴史を十分に詳しく研究して、最後の千年紀の主要な戦いを全て覚えているのですが、首都の惑星で戦われたことは一度もありません。」
languages.original_text: {n}The Factotum takes to absent-mindedly twirling the autoquill in his hand.{/n}"Let me think... That is strange indeed. I have studied the history of the dynasty in enough detail to recall all the major battles of the last millennium, and none took place on the capital world."

traits.locale_text: {n}ファクトゥムは、オートキルの先を無意識に回している。{/n}「考えてみましょう...それは確かに奇妙ですね。私はこの王朝の歴史を十分に詳しく研究して、最後の千年紀の主要な戦いを全て覚えているのですが、首都の惑星で戦われたことは一度もありません。」
